author: chujiu-dev
description: Interactively run code blocks in Obsidian with stdin input support. Supports Python, C, C++, Java, Go, JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust, Kotlin and more. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: chujiu-dev
manifest.description: Interactively run code blocks with stdin input support. Supports Python, C, C++, Java, Go, JavaScript and more.
manifest.name: Code Runner

name: Code Runner

releases.author: chujiu-dev
releases.description:
## Fixes for Obsidian Community Plugin Review

- Remove 'Obsidian' from manifest description (redundant per review policy)
- Replace dynamic import variable with static URL string to fix 'Unsafe call to import' error
- Add descriptions to eslint-enable directive comments in Play.tsx
- Fix eslint-disable-next-line placement for engine.terminate()
- Add eslint-disable for unsafe return in python.ts cache check
- Bundle: 50.38 KB

releases.author: chujiu-dev
releases.description:

releases.author: chujiu-dev
releases.description:
## Changes

### New Features
- **Interactive input detection**: Programs using `input()`, `scanf()`, `Scanner` and other stdin functions are now detected before execution and show a bilingual warning instead of freezing Obsidian
- Detects stdin usage across 8 languages: Python, C, C++, Java, Go, C#, Swift, R

### Fixes
- Prevents Obsidian from freezing when running programs that require real-time interactive input (feature under development)

### README
- Updated future plans section to mention interactive input feature
releases.name: 1.0.8 - Interactive Input Detection

releases.author: chujiu-dev
releases.description:
## Changes

### New Features
- **Gray separator line**: A thick gray horizontal line now separates the code block from the input/output areas
- **Close buttons**: A × button at the top-right of both input and output areas for easy dismissal/clearing on all platforms (especially useful on iPad where hover-based controls don't work)

### Fixes
- Removed hover-dependent clear button — replaced with always-visible × button for cross-platform consistency
- Section labels deferred to a future release with language switching support
releases.name: 1.0.7 - UI Improvements

releases.author: chujiu-dev
releases.description:
## Changes

### New Features
- **Gray separator line**: A thick gray horizontal line now separates the code block from the input/output areas
- **Section labels**: "输入内容" (Input) and "输出内容" (Output) labels at the top-left of each area, with slightly larger font for clear visual distinction
- **Close buttons**: A × button at the top-right of both input and output areas for easy dismissal/clearing on all platforms (especially useful on iPad where hover-based controls don't work)

### Fixes
- Removed hover-dependent clear button — replaced with always-visible × button for cross-platform consistency
releases.name: 1.0.6 - UI Improvements

releases.author: chujiu-dev
releases.description:
## Fix

### Code Obfuscation Error Fixed
- **Removed `document.createElement('script')`** — replaced with `import()` using hardcoded literal URLs
- **Deleted `src/lib/url_import.ts`** — no more generic dynamic script loader
- **Python**: `import('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.26.2/full/pyodide.mjs')` — Pyodide ESM build
- **TypeScript**: `import('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/typescript@4.7.4/lib/typescript.min.js')` — CDN, not bundled
- **Wenyan**: `import('https://unpkg.com/@wenyan/core/index.min.js')` — CDN, side-effect import

### Key difference from v1.0.3
- Uses **literal string URLs** in `import()` calls, not template strings or variables
- TypeScript is NOT bundled (no `_0x` obfuscation in release assets)
- Bundle size: 48.3 KB
releases.name: 1.0.5 - Fix Dynamic Script Injection

releases.author: chujiu-dev
releases.description:
## Changes

### Errors Fixed
- Remove 'Obsidian' from manifest description
- Add descriptions to all eslint-disable directive comments
- Add eslint-enable closure for no-param-reassign
- Add justification for dynamic script injection (Pyodide WASM loading)
- Replace new Function() with window to eliminate Function constructor error

### Warnings Fixed
- Replace crypto-js/md5 with native djb2 hash function
- Replace builtin-modules package with inline Node.js builtins list
- Replace fetch() with requestUrl() from Obsidian API in all language backends
- Remove deprecated dependencies (crypto-js, builtin-modules)

### Package
- Bundle size: 48.1 KB
releases.name: 1.0.4 - Community Review Fixes

releases.author: chujiu-dev
releases.description:
## v1.0.0 — Initial Release

First public release of Code Runner.

### Features
- Run code blocks interactively in 18+ languages
- Stdin input support for Python, C, C++, Java, Go, C#, Swift, R
- Keyboard toggle to show/hide input textarea
- Per-file output caching via localStorage
- Clean, minimal settings UI

### Supported Languages
Python, C, C++, Java, Go, C#, Swift, R, JavaScript, TypeScript, Rust, Kotlin, Haskell, Crystal, V (Vlang), Wenyan, HTML

### Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` and place them in `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/code-runner/`
releases.name: v1.0.0 — Initial Release
